# Tight end speed advantage

## Short Teaching Summary
Tight end speed advantage: The player with the greacheck-in momentum is the tight end, as the tight end travels twice as fast as the lineman. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
